fatal_flaws.description: Things in the plan that will break or fail in practice. Empty array if none.

hidden_assumptions.description: Silent dependencies or preconditions the plan relies on without stating them.

simpler_alternative.description: A materially different, simpler approach worth considering. Null if the plan's approach is already the simplest reasonable one.

points_of_agreement.description: 1-3 strongest parts of the plan to keep unchanged. Be honest; empty array if nothing is strong.

verdict.description: SHIP = plan is sound, proceed. REVISE = proceed after addressing specific concerns. RECONSIDER = the approach itself is wrong, start over.
